prerequisites: A Delighted account with API access. Each Delighted CX project has its own API key.
Your Delighted API key. If you do not have one, contact your Delighted account admin to obtain it (ensure the correct project is selected in the top left-hand corner of the Delighted dashboard).
A Unix timestamp for the 'since' config field, marking the point from which to fetch survey responses created on or after that time.

authMethods.name: API key (HTTP Basic auth)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate by supplying your Delighted API key in the connector's 'api_key' field. Delighted requires all requests over HTTPS, authenticated via HTTP Basic Auth using the API key as the username with a blank password. Each CX project has its own key; keep it private.

setupSteps.title: Obtain your Delighted API key
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Delighted and select the correct CX project in the top left-hand corner. Each project has its own private API key. If you cannot locate the key, contact your Delighted account admin to obtain it. Keep the key private.

setupSteps.title: Set the 'api_key' field
setupSteps.body: Paste your Delighted API key into the connector's required 'api_key' field. The connector uses it for HTTP Basic Auth (API key as username, blank password) against the Delighted API at https://api.delighted.com/v1.

setupSteps.title: Set the 'since' field
setupSteps.body: Provide a Unix timestamp in the required 'since' field. Delighted uses this to restrict survey responses to those created on or after that time, defining the starting point for the sync.

sources.title: Delighted API authentication (HTTP Basic auth with API key)
